title: Functions, Parameters, this, and Callable Contracts · Behavior Workshop
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable transformations, callbacks, methods, and boundary adapters. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a function-oriented routing toolkit while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose function declarations, expressions, arrows, and methods from hoisting, this, construction, and readability needs.
Use defaults, rest parameters, destructuring, and validation without hiding required inputs.
Separate returned values, mutations, I/O, and thrown failures into an understandable callable contract.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
